meaning: Consignment booked on a specific flight or routing.
cortex_interpretation: Planned booking exists, but cargo is not yet accepted.

meaning: Freight is on hand with the carrier/handler before ready-for-carriage acceptance.
cortex_interpretation: Cargo is physically present but not necessarily accepted as ready.

meaning: Consignment physically received from shipper/agent and accepted for carriage.
cortex_interpretation: Readiness moved from planned to accepted for carriage.

meaning: Shipment manifested on a specific flight.
cortex_interpretation: Shipment is planned/declared on flight manifest.

meaning: Shipment has been loaded onto the flight.
cortex_interpretation: Cargo appears loaded; await departure confirmation.

meaning: Shipment departed on a specific flight.
cortex_interpretation: Cargo has left origin or transfer airport.
Aircraft arrived; cargo still needs handler receipt/processing.

meaning: Shipment unloaded/received from flight by handler.
cortex_interpretation: Cargo is physically received after flight arrival.

meaning: Shipment transferred to another carrier, flight, or airport area.
cortex_interpretation: Transit/interline handover occurred; check next leg and dwell risk.

meaning: Consignee/agent notified that shipment has arrived or will be ready for collection.
Shipment documents delivered to consignee or agent.
cortex_interpretation: Documentation handover occurred; can support clearance/pickup.

meaning: Shipment delivered to consignee or agent.
Shipment was offloaded from planned flight or routing.
cortex_interpretation: Disruption. Re-route, capacity, acceptance or security issue may exist.
Exception. Investigate piece count, weight, documents or damage.

meaning: Cargo missing or not located as expected.
Cargo carried beyond planned destination/transfer point.
